items.title: Iran names Mojtaba Khamenei to succeed his slain father as supreme leader
items.summary: DUBAI (AP): Mojtaba Khamenei, a son of Iran's late supreme leader, has been named his successor, Iranian state TV announced early Monday, as the war that began a little over a week ago with his father's killing took a dramatic turn. The younger Khamenei, who had not been seen or heard from publicly since the war started, had long been considered a contender for the post, even before an Israeli strike killed Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, and despite never being elected or appointed to a government position. Read full story

This kit would fetch $150 at full price, with it having been keeping down at this rate since mid-January. While we’ve seen it go a bit lower in the past, you’re still looking at a solid $30 markdown here that lets you upgrade your media viewing experience at the second-best price of 2026 and the third-best overall. If you want to get the same reactive backlighting for your TVs of 40 to 85 inches in size while saving a bit more without the smart light bars in the above package, you can find Govee’s three standard TV Backlight 3 Lite sizes starting from $54.99 shipped right now.
